description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a deploy stage that includes a job named pages. The pages job runs on the master branch only (using only: - master), uses the default Docker image, and executes the exact shell commands: mkdir .public, cp -r * .public, and mv .public public. It publishes the public directory as an artifact (paths: public). No services, caches, variables, or additional deployment targets are defined beyond GitLab Pages.
